title: Planks 3D
description: 3D Planks is a Minecraft texture pack that enhances the appearance of wooden planks and slabs by making them 3D.
body:
![Planks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/58ea10d05ab50b1d295d7e0d78c9612c145d2f79.png)

3D Planks is a Minecraft texture pack that enhances the appearance of wooden planks and slabs by making them 3D. This pack does not include 3D textures for stairs, fence gates, doors, or fences but does incorporate the new textures into the GUI for a more immersive experience.

3D Planks transforms the look of wooden planks and slabs in Minecraft by giving them a three-dimensional appearance. This texture pack focuses on providing a more realistic and detailed look to the game's building materials, enhancing your overall gameplay experience.

Features:
- 3D Wooden Planks and Slabs: All wooden planks and slabs are rendered in 3D, giving them a more lifelike and appealing appearance.
- GUI Integration: The 3D textures are also included in the game's GUI, ensuring a consistent visual experience across your inventory and crafting menus.
- Selective Enhancement: This pack specifically updates the textures for planks and slabs, excluding stairs, fence gates, doors, or fences, to maintain a focused and optimized texture pack.

Upgrade your Minecraft building projects with 3D Planks and enjoy a richer, more detailed visual experience!

## Ajude Com qualquer Quantia ( Não Reenbolsável )
